div.p: The United Nations Security Council met on August 22 from 3 to 6:50 p. m.; for the record, see U.N. document S/PV. 489. No substantive action took place, the entire meeting being devoted to a lengthy statement by the Soviet Representative accusing the United States of aggression in Korea, to which responses were made by the representatives of the United Kingdom and the United States. The Council then adjourned until August 25.
